thread.title: Trump fills cabinet spots after selecting Rollins as agriculture chief
thread.title_full: Trump fills cabinet spots after selecting Rollins as agriculture chief

author: JAMEL VALENCIA | The National News Desk
title: Trump fills cabinet spots after selecting Rollins as agriculture chief
text: {p}President-elect Donald Trump announced his pick for U.S. Secretary of Agriculture, completing his nominee spots for his {a href=\"https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now/trump-taps-hedge-fund-manager-scott-bessent-as-treasury-secretary-aims-to-cut-deficit-russel-vought-project-2025-conservative-golden-age-united-states-president-elect-senate-lori-chavez-deremer#\" target=\"_blank\" title=\"https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now/trump-taps-hedge-fund-manager-scott-bessent-as-treasury-secretary-aims-to-cut-deficit-russel-vought-project-2025-conservative-golden-age-united-states-president-elect-senate-lori-chavez-deremer#\"}cabinet{/a}.{/p}{p}On Saturday, Trump announced that Texan Brooke L. Rollins will oversee the country's agency that controls policies, regulations, and aid programs related to farming, forestry, ranching, food quality and nutrition.{/p}{blockquote}As our next Secretary of Agriculture, Brooke will spearhead the effort to protect American Farmers, who are truly the backbone of our Country. Congratulations Brooke!{/blockquote}{p}Rollins currently heads the Trump-allies America First Policy Institute \"building a team of loyal Patriots.\"{/p}{p}He stated that Rollins developed and managed the transformational domestic policy agenda of his administration.{/p}{p}She was the director of Trump's Office of American Innovation during his first-term in the Oval Office. {/p}{p}The nomination must be confirmed by the Republican-led Senate. {/p}{p}Rollins would succeed President Joe Biden’s agriculture secretary, Tom Vilsack. {/p}{p}{sd-embed class=\"sd-embedded-media\" data-embed-file=\"%3Cdiv%3E%3Ciframe%20src=%22https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113534345225690420/embed%22%20class=%22truthsocial-embed%22%20style=%22max-width:%20100%25;%20border:%200%22%20width=%22600%22%20allowfullscreen=%22allowfullscreen%22%3E%3C/iframe%3E%3Cscript%20src=%22https://truthsocial.com/embed.js%22%20async=%22async%22%3E%3C/script%3E%3C/div%3E\" data-embed-type=\"code\" contenteditable=\"false\"}{/sd-embed}{/p}{p}Rollins graduated from Texas A&M University with a a Bachelor’s of Science Degree in Agriculture Development. {/p}{p}{br}{/p}{p}Patchy frost will be possible this weekend for both Saturday and Sunday morning.{/p}{p}Temperatures will range from the low 30s west of I-65 to mid 30s east of I-65.{/p}{p}Nashville should remain above freezing, which keeps the record for latest fall freeze still alive. (Nov 27th, 2009){/p}{p}Partly cloudy skies both days, with highs in the mid 50s on Saturday and mid 60s on Saturday.{/p}{p}The next rain chance will arrive Monday with scattered showers possible.{/p}{p}The few days leading up to Thanksgiving also look a little wet, with scattered showers Wednesday and Turkey day Thursday.{/p}{p}Heavy pockets of rain could be possible early Thanksgiving.{/p}{p}Chief Meteorologist Katy Morgan{br}{/p}{p}Climatology{/p}{p}November 22nd{/p}{p}LOW: 42 AVERAGE: 38{/p}{p}HIGH: 53 AVERAGE: 59{br}{/p}{p}PRECIPITATION:{/p}{p}TODAY: 0.00{/p}{p}MONTH: 2.53 (0.11 above average){/p}{p}YEAR: 43.38 (1.48 below average){/p}{p}President-elect Donald Trump announced his pick for U.S. Secretary of Agriculture, completing his nominee spots for his {a href=\"https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now/trump-taps-hedge-fund-manager-scott-bessent-as-treasury-secretary-aims-to-cut-deficit-russel-vought-project-2025-conservative-golden-age-united-states-president-elect-senate-lori-chavez-deremer#\" target=\"_blank\" title=\"https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now/trump-taps-hedge-fund-manager-scott-bessent-as-treasury-secretary-aims-to-cut-deficit-russel-vought-project-2025-conservative-golden-age-united-states-president-elect-senate-lori-chavez-deremer#\"}cabinet{/a}.{/p}{p}On Saturday, Trump announced that Texan Brooke L. Rollins will oversee the country's agency that controls policies, regulations, and aid programs related to farming, forestry, ranching, food quality and nutrition.{/p}{blockquote}As our next Secretary of Agriculture, Brooke will spearhead the effort to protect American Farmers, who are truly the backbone of our Country. Congratulations Brooke!{/blockquote}{p}Rollins currently heads the Trump-allies America First Policy Institute \"building a team of loyal Patriots.\"{/p}{p}He stated that Rollins developed and managed the transformational domestic policy agenda of his administration.{/p}{p}She was the director of Trump's Office of American Innovation during his first-term in the Oval Office. {/p}{p}The nomination must be confirmed by the Republican-led Senate. {/p}{p}Rollins would succeed President Joe Biden’s agriculture secretary, Tom Vilsack. {/p}{p}{sd-embed class=\"sd-embedded-media\" data-embed-file=\"%3Cdiv%3E%3Ciframe%20src=%22https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113534345225690420/embed%22%20class=%22truthsocial-embed%22%20style=%22max-width:%20100%25;%20border:%200%22%20width=%22600%22%20allowfullscreen=%22allowfullscreen%22%3E%3C/iframe%3E%3Cscript%20src=%22https://truthsocial.com/embed.js%22%20async=%22async%22%3E%3C/script%3E%3C/div%3E\" data-embed-type=\"code\" contenteditable=\"false\"}{/sd-embed}{/p}{p}Rollins graduated from Texas A&M University with a a Bachelor’s of Science Degree in Agriculture Development. {/p}{p}{br}{/p}{p}Patchy frost will be possible this weekend for both Saturday and Sunday morning.{/p}{p}Temperatures will range from the low 30s west of I-65 to mid 30s east of I-65.{/p}{p}Nashville should remain above freezing, which keeps the record for latest fall freeze still alive. (Nov 27th, 2009){/p}{p}Partly cloudy skies both days, with highs in the mid 50s on Saturday and mid 60s on Saturday.{/p}{p}The next rain chance will arrive Monday with scattered showers possible.{/p}{p}The few days leading up to Thanksgiving also look a little wet, with scattered showers Wednesday and Turkey day Thursday.{/p}{p}Heavy pockets of rain could be possible early Thanksgiving.{/p}{p}Chief Meteorologist Katy Morgan{br}{/p}{p}Climatology{/p}{p}November 22nd{/p}{p}LOW: 42 AVERAGE: 38{/p}{p}HIGH: 53 AVERAGE: 59{br}{/p}{p}PRECIPITATION:{/p}{p}TODAY: 0.00{/p}{p}MONTH: 2.53 (0.11 above average){/p}{p}YEAR: 43.38 (1.48 below average){/p}
